subcodes.first_line: Hearken unto the call of thy Lord, the Mighty, the All-Bountiful, that verily there is none other God but Him. He preserveth whomsoever He willeth, in whatsoever manner He willeth, and verily He [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اسمع ندآء ربک العزیز الوهاب بانه لا اله الا هو یحفظ من یشاء کیف یشاء و انه
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @chastisement and requital, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @day of Resurrection; Judgement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
